sentiment.reasoning: Record revenue growth of 8% indicates strong business momentum and positive financial health.

sentiment.reasoning: An investor day focused on strategy is a standard corporate communication event that does not inherently change financial outlook.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
